review_text: Love this little shop on Mass Ave. Always stop in when I'm in the area. Great prices and the flowers are always super fresh.
Just moved to the area and this place is a hidden treasure. Beautiful selection and the most helpful staff. My new go-to florist.
Quick birthday bouquet pickup. In and out in 10 minutes and it was beautiful. Sometimes simple and fast is all you need.
Ordered a specific color scheme for a birthday and they substituted without asking. The flowers were fine but not what I ordered.
Was browsing and the staff member hovering over me made me uncomfortable. Felt like I was being rushed to buy something.
Graduation bouquet was already wilting when I picked it up. Had to ask them to redo it which made me late to the ceremony. Stressful.
Hospital delivery took two days instead of same-day as promised. When they finally arrived, the arrangement was smaller than what I ordered. Not cool.
Online order looked nothing like the picture. Arrangement was much smaller than expected. Disappointing.
Quick birthday bouquet pickup. In and out in 10 minutes and it was beautiful. Sometimes simple and fast is all you need.

Tried to order online for Valentine's and the website kept crashing. By the time I got through, they were out of most things. Frustrating experience.
Just moved to the area and this place is a hidden treasure. Beautiful selection and the most helpful staff. My new go-to florist.

Mother's Day arrangement was much smaller than what was shown online. My mom was polite about it but I could tell she was underwhelmed. Not ordering again.
